tasks.subject: Task 1: Merge model columns in RequestsView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the two separate model/upstreamModel columns with a single merged column.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/src/views/RequestsView.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Only one model column exists
- [x] Two ColumnFilters side-by-side in header
- [x] Cell shows upstreamModel top, model small below when different

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/views/RequestsView.vue"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Only one model column", "Two ColumnFilters side-by-side in header", "Cell shows upstreamModel top, model small below when different"]}
```
